items.title: The Pentagon's fight with Anthropic sparks fears in Silicon Valley and the Capitol of a fundamental shift in the balance of power between DC and the AI industry (Brendan Bordelon/Politico)

items.title_zh: 五角大楼与 Anthropic 的斗争引发了硅谷和国会大厦对华盛顿特区与人工智能行业之间权力平衡发生根本性转变的担忧（Brendan Bordelon/Politico）
